mapper.select:
/* subsdMapper.getRateGrpRateCdList */ SELECT A.RATE_CD FROM MSP_RATE_MST A , CMN_INTM_MDL B WHERE A.APPL_END_DT = '99991231' AND A.SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' AND A.RATE_GRP_CD = #{rateGrpCd} AND B.PRDT_ID = #{prdtId} AND A.RATE_TYPE IN (B.PRDT_TYPE_CD, '00')
AND A.DATA_TYPE IN ('3G', 'LTE')
AND A.DATA_TYPE IN ('LTE', '5G')
AND A.DATA_TYPE = '3G'
AND A.DATA_TYPE = 'LTE'
AND A.DATA_TYPE = '5G'

/* subsdMapper.getCopySubsdAmtInfo */ SELECT DISTINCT A.PRDT_ID ,A.OLD_YN ,A.SUBSD_AMT ,#{rateCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS RATE_CD ,'N' AS RATE_GRP_YN ,#{applStrtDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS APPL_STRT_DT ,#{agrmTrm, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS AGRM_TRM ,#{agrmTrmNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS AGRM_TRM_NM ,#{operType, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS OPER_TYPE ,#{operTypeNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS OPER_TYPE_NM ,B.PRDT_NM FROM ( SELECT /*+ LEADING(C B A D) */ A.PRDT_ID , A.OLD_YN , MAX(A.SUBSD_AMT) AS SUBSD_AMT FROM MSP_OFCL_SUBSD_MST A ,MSP_RATE_MST B ,MSP_RATE_MST C ,CMN_GRP_CD_MST D WHERE A.RATE_CD = B.RATE_CD AND A.APPL_END_DT >= #{applStrtDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND B.RATE_GRP_CD = C.RATE_GRP_CD AND C.RATE_CD = #{rateCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.AGRM_TRM = D.CD_VAL AND D.GRP_ID = 'CMN0053' AND D.USG_YN = 'Y' AND D.ETC5 = 'Y' AND #{applStrtDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR} BETWEEN B.APPL_STRT_DT AND B.APPL_END_DT AND #{applStrtDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR} BETWEEN C.APPL_STRT_DT AND C.APPL_END_DT GROUP BY A.PRDT_ID, A.OLD_YN ) A ,CMN_INTM_MDL B WHERE A.PRDT_ID = B.PRDT_ID AND B.RPRS_YN = 'Y' AND B.PRDT_TYPE_CD = '01' AND B.PRDT_DT = '99991231' ORDER BY A.PRDT_ID, A.OLD_YN
